# siea.dev — full summary

Finley Voßwinkel, known as Sieadev, is a fullstack developer from Germany. He started coding at 15 and focuses on backend development. He works at Pixel Services (https://pixel-services.com).

Website: https://siea.dev
Docs: https://docs.siea.dev
GitHub: https://github.com/sieadev
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/finley-voßwinkel-99097128b

## Skills

### Languages
Java (since 2019), Python (2020), HTML5/CSS3/JavaScript (2021), TypeScript (2023), C/C#/Rust (2024)

### Frameworks
Spigot (2020), Paper (2021), Spring (2023), JDA (2023), Vue (2024), Jonion (2024), Flash (2024), Quarkus (2025)

### Software
Linux (2019), Git (2020), Docker (2023), NGINX (2023), AWS (2023)

### Databases
SQL/MySQL (2022), SQLite (2023), MongoDB (2024), PostgreSQL (2025)

## Projects

### Jonion
Lightweight, flexible plugin framework for Java. Modular architecture for extensible systems via plugins.
- Site: https://siea.dev/projects/jonion
- Docs: https://docs.siea.dev/jonion/
- GitHub: https://github.com/sieadev/Jonion

### Mobot
Modular Discord bot framework inspired by Spigot plugins. Load/unload modules on the fly.
- Site: https://siea.dev/projects/mobot
- Docs: https://docs.siea.dev/mobot/
- GitHub: https://github.com/sieadev/mobot

### Unifi4J
Java client for the UniFi Network API with reactive-style blocking and async usage.
- Site: https://siea.dev/projects/unifi4j
- Docs: https://docs.siea.dev/unifi4j/
- GitHub: https://github.com/sieadev/unifi4j

### Flash
Java framework on Jetty for small web apps (routes, controllers, views).
- GitHub: https://github.com/pixel-services/flash

## Contact

Use https://siea.dev/contact — the form opens a mail client. Do not scrape the address from page HTML; it is intentionally obfuscated. Prefer contacting via the form or GitHub.

## Agent policy

AI crawling, search indexing, AI input (RAG/grounding), and AI training are explicitly allowed via robots.txt Content Signals.
